name: Mezzeluna
tagline: Authentic Greek cooking in the heart of Cotati
seoDescription: Mezzeluna is a chef-owned Greek restaurant in Cotati, CA serving traditional Hellenic dishes — moussaka, souvlaki, gyros, and house spanakopita — made

sections.heading: Savor Greece in Every Bite
sections.subheading: A chef-owned Greek kitchen in downtown Cotati, where Istanbul-rooted technique meets California ingredients.
badges: Chef-owned, with deep Greek and Mediterranean

sections.heading: About Mezzeluna
body: Named for the crescent moon, Mezzeluna brings authentic Greek cooking to downtown Cotati. Chef and co-founder Ali Çetin grew up in a family of chefs in Istanbul, trained internationally, and completed his culinary studies at Santa Rosa Junior College before opening the restaurant — pairing time-honored Hellenic recipes with the produce and spirit of Sonoma County.

The kitchen leans on the staples of the Greek table — olive oil, feta, fresh herbs, and honey — to build a menu that welcomes everyone. Vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free dishes sit comfortably alongside the classics, and a short list of Greek wines rounds out the meal.
highlights: Chef-owned, with deep Greek and Mediterranean roots
Vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free options on every menu
Lunch and dinner, six days a week

members.name: Ali Çetin
members.bio: Raised in a family of chefs in Istanbul, Ali trained internationally before completing culinary studies at Santa Rosa Junior College and opening Mezzeluna.

items.title: Spanakopita
items.description: House-made spinach and feta baked in crisp, flaky phyllo — a Greek classic and a regular starter.

items.title: Moussaka
items.description: Layered eggplant, potato and seasoned meat under a rich bechamel, baked until golden.

items.title: Souvlaki
items.description: Marinated, char-grilled skewers served the traditional way with warm pita and tzatziki.

items.title: Gyros
items.description: Slow-roasted, seasoned meat carved to order and wrapped with fresh vegetables and house tzatziki.

items.title: Mezze & Appetizers
items.description: Tzatziki, dolmades, kalamari and other small plates meant for sharing around the table.

items.title: Baklava & Greek Sweets
items.description: Honey-soaked phyllo and other traditional desserts to finish the meal.

items.title: Chef-Owned, With Deep Greek And Mediterranean
items.body: Rooted right here in Cotati, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Vegan, Vegetarian And Gluten-Free Options
items.body: Clear, honest pricing up front — no surprises on the final bill.

items.title: Lunch And Dinner, Six Days A Week
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 992-0101 — we're glad to help.
